description: Endpoint authorizes by role but not by object ownership, letting a valid user access another user's resource by id.
body: Failure mode: GET/PUT /resource/:id checks that the caller has a role but not that they own or may access that specific id, so changing the id reaches someone else's data. Detection signals: handler loads by id from the path with only a function-level role guard; no owner/tenant comparison; no negative test for cross-user access. Do not assume a role check covers object access. Safer fallback: compare the resource's owner/tenant to the principal at the data layer and add a negative test where a valid user requests an object they do not own.
